billingsoftware/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
billingsoftware/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17 semantics, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

billingsoftware/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
billingsoftware/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may fail to compile or process annotations correctly on Java 21 due to internal API changes or lack of support.

billingsoftware/pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag matching the java.version property.
billingsoftware/pom.xml.why_exists: Without the release flag, the compiler might not enforce cross-compilation compatibility with Java 21, potentially generating bytecode incompatible with the target runtime or missing language feature enforcement.
